_comment: FRAGMENT — install.sh deep-merges these entries into .claude/settings.json; it is NOT a full settings file and must never clobber existing hooks. All commands are repo-relative (resolved from the repo root at run time), never absolute. SessionStart runs a bounded probe that touches nothing and can never fail the session (|| true, short timeout). Stop runs ONE bounded tick, and only when CCL_TICK_ON_STOP=1 is set — off by default.
